mapper.sql: select c.check_in_id, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.task_id, t.task_name, c.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.user_name, ''), c.user_name) as user_name, c.check_in_time, c.longitude, c.latitude, c.address, c.check_in_type, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.del_flag from fire_check_in c left join fire_maintenance_task t on c.task_id = t.task_id left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into fire_check_in ( company_id, company_name, task_id, user_id, user_name, check_in_time, longitude, latitude, address, check_in_type, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{companyId}, #{companyName}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{checkInTime}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{address}, #{checkInType}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update fire_check_in set del_flag = '2' where check_in_id = #{checkInId}

update fire_check_in set del_flag = '2' where check_in_id in
#{checkInId}
mapper.select: select image_id, check_in_id, image_url, image_name, sort_order, create_time from fire_check_in_image where check_in_id = #{checkInId} order by sort_order
mapper.insert: insert into fire_check_in_image (check_in_id, image_url, image_name, sort_order, create_time) values (#{checkInId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageName}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate())
mapper.select: where c.del_flag = '0' and c.task_id = #{taskId} and c.user_id = #{userId} and c.check_in_type = '0' and not exists ( select 1 from fire_check_in o where o.del_flag = '0' and o.task_id = c.task_id and o.user_id = c.user_id and o.check_in_type = '1' and o.check_in_time > c.check_in_time ) order by c.check_in_time desc limit 1
